name: engage
tagline: Heart + share + copy - the engagement bundle for EmDash
highlights: One import for the full engagement bar - heart, share, and copy link
Uniform variant, size, and theme props applied to all three children
Show/hide individual components with showHeart, showShare, showCopy props
Circle, pill, and ghost variants for consistent visual treatment
lead: Heart. Share. Copy. One import. Three plugins.

variants.name: circle
variants.description: Icon buttons in circular containers - the default

variants.name: pill
variants.description: Icon + label in rounded pill shapes

variants.name: ghost
variants.description: Text and icons only, no border or background
